message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate hmac, gzip, html, chunk to ZigBuilder

- hmac_mod.zig: Migrate genNew, genDigest to use emitInlineBlockStart/End
- gzip_mod.zig: Migrate genOpen to use emitInlineBlockStart/End
- html_mod.zig: Migrate genEscape, genUnescape to use emitInlineBlockStart/End
- chunk_mod.zig: Migrate genChunk to use emitInlineBlockStart/End

Progress: 31 files remaining
